name: Arena match: 4-hero ghost battle with ranking and leaderboard

planSteps.description: Click the arena deploy button (data-testid deploy-arena)
Within about 40 seconds the results screen (#screen-results) becomes visible
The ranking list (data-testid result-ranking) shows more than one hero row (opponents fetched from matchmaking or bot fallback)
A world leaderboard section (data-testid leaderboard-list) is visible with at least one entry
